title: Pisola fort
tagline: Pisola fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Pisola Fort is a fort located 125 km (78 miles) from Nashik, in the Nashik district of Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Pisola Fort is a fort located 125 km (78 miles) from Nashik, in the Nashik district of Maharashtra, India. This fort lies exactly on the borders of Dhule & Nashik District. One side is in Sakri Taluka & another is in Satana Taluka. Though this fort is an important fort in Nashik district, it is less visited by trekkers.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pisola fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pisola fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pisola fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (130 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (108 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pisola fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pisola fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pisola fort?
faq.a: Stays in Pisola fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
